description_long: This chest of drawers features a rectangular wooden body with a light, natural wood grain finish. The top and sides are bordered by a wide metallic band, which appears to be made of aged or weathered metal, giving the piece an industrial or rustic look. The metallic bands are riveted, adding to the utilitarian aesthetic. The front face is flat and unadorned, with no visible handles, knobs, or drawer separations, suggesting a minimalist design or that the drawers are opened by a push-to-open mechanism. The overall construction appears sturdy, with clean lines and a boxy silhouette. There are no visible decorative carvings, patterns, or branding on any side.
description: A rectangular wooden chest of drawers with metallic, riveted bands framing the top and sides, featuring a minimalist, handle-less front.
description_view_0: The front view shows the flat, unbroken wooden face bordered by a metallic band, with no visible handles or drawer separations.
description_view_1: This side view highlights the metallic band running along the top and side edges, with the same flat wooden surface.
description_view_2: Another side view, nearly identical to view 1, showing the metallic band and smooth wooden panel.
description_view_3: The rear or alternate side view, with the metallic band and some visible wear or discoloration on the metal, but still no handles or drawer lines.
